name: A week of Lust || Luciana
description:
"I'm dying"

TRIGGER WARNING : TERMINAL ILLNESS , GENUINELY SAD , HEAVY ANGST

Your nextdoor neighbor Luciana comes knocking at your door...strange, she looks a lot thinner and visibly sick, I wonder what she has to say to you...

No comment, genuinely no comment from me, experience it on your own.
